name: Chicken and Cornmeal Dumplings
recipeIngredient: 9 oz Package frozen cut green beans; thaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Transfer the thawed green beans to the crockpot.
2. Add the cooked chicken, diced potatoes, chicken broth, vegetable juice cocktail, celery, onion, chili powder, salt, and hot pepper sauce to the pot.
3. Cover and cook on LOW for 4 hours.
4. Turn the setting to HIGH and heat until bubbling occurs. If needed, add water at this point.
5. In a separate bowl, combine the biscuit mix, cornmeal, half of the shredded cheese, and parsley. Add milk and stir until just moistened.
6. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto the stew in the crockpot.
7. Cover and cook for 2 1/2 more hours (do not lift the cover).
8. Sprinkle the remaining shredded cheese over the dumplings before serving.
